description:
Lightweight, high-performance desktop database management tool for PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and Oracle.

Lightweight, high-performance desktop database management tool built with Vue 3 and a Rust-based backend extension.
[0.4.9] - 2026-07-22
Added
- Database: Added support for database creation and dropping in Oracle driver.
Fixed
- Database: Fixed a protocol desynchronization and buffer underflow error when parsing Named Object (UDT) values in the Oracle driver.
